Revocation Velocity (Last 6 Months)

SmartHub Core Rules & Logic

  • The Draft Transit Hub: Moving a user's card into the "Draft" column on any Visual Task Board (VTB) will immediately clear their current license assignment and automatically mark them as Manually Revoked.
  • Automated Data Syncing: The dashboard caches data for performance. Always click the Sync Data button in the top right corner to refresh the charts after performing VTB actions.
  • Data Integrity: Do not manually alter backend choices in the license_audit table. All license mapping should be handled exclusively through the Guided VTBs to prevent data misalignment.
  • Inactivity Thresholds: Users exceeding 89 days of inactivity cross the critical threshold and will be automatically revoked on Day 90 per the timeline policy.

Navigation Guide

  • Command Center: Your operational homepage. Displays top-level financial savings, urgent pending actions, and allows quick inline Retain/Revoke decisions.
  • Analytics: A deep dive into current license distribution, review state tracking, and the visual timeline for the automated role removal policy.
  • License VTBs (Top Header Navigation): Your primary management tool. Navigate here to sort users across ITSM, CSM, HRSD, and SPM departments using drag-and-drop mechanics.

Accessing Interactive VTBs

Visual Task Boards (VTBs) are your primary workspace for auditing and reassigning licenses. You can access them through any of these three navigation points:

License VTBs

1. Global Sidebar

Use the persistent left-hand navigation menu from anywhere in the app.

License VTBs

2. Top Header Tabs

Quick-switch using the header tabs at the top right of the screen.

3. Contextual Actions

Jump directly into the board from any "Action Required" data table.

Ready to manage licenses? Launch License VTBs

Core Status & Action Colors

These bold colors indicate the functional state of a license or dictate user action.

SmartHub Blue (#1e3a8a)

Represents the core brand identity, active navigation states, and headers.

Retained & Safe (#3b82f6)

Indicates a license that has been manually reviewed and safely retained.

Newly Assigned (#22c55e)

Represents fresh licenses (0-30 days) operating safely within compliance.

Pending Review (#f59e0b)

Highlights items requiring manual review or users approaching inactivity thresholds.

Manually Revoked (#ea580c)

Signifies a license that was explicitly removed by a manager via inline action or VTB drag-and-drop.

Auto-Revoked & Critical (#ef4444)

Signifies destructive actions or users who crossed the strict 90-day inactivity limit.

License Classification Palette

High-contrast tones used consistently across all analytics donuts to represent specific license types.

Draft (#94a3b8)
Legacy Approver (#eab308)
Agile Team Member (#f97316)
ITSM Enterprise (#06b6d4)
CSM Enterprise (#d946ef)
HRSD Enterprise (#4f46e5)
ITSM Professional (#3b82f6)
CSM Professional (#a855f7)
HRSD Professional (#818cf8)
ITSM Standard (#0ea5e9)
CSM Standard (#84cc16)
HRSD Standard (#10b981)
SPM Enterprise (#e11d48)
SPM Professional (#fb923c)
SPM Standard (#f43f5e)
ITSM Admin / Dev (#2563eb)
CSM Administrator (#14b8a6)
HR Administrator (#8b5cf6)
SPM Administrator (#6366f1)
CSM Contributor (#22c55e)
Employee Relations (#ec4899)
